narrative:
Bay Village-04-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,122 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.9 percentage points.
